rows.label: tlk42100141_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Long before Vandham became a merc,
he was from Invidia's capital.

rows.label: tlk42100141_04_msg0002
tlk42100141_04_msg0003
rows.name:
He was a big shot from
the Paronet family,
one of Invidia's noble houses.

rows.label: tlk42100141_04_msg0004
rows.name:
By the way, the name Vandham
came from a famous person
he admired as a child.
